case_title: ESTHER NNADI et al VS. ALTON MANAGEMENT CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NNADI, ESTHER NNADI, ESTHER GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR ONYEMAECHI NNADI (MINOR)
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, ADVANCED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FROM NOV-27-2013 TO SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON NOV-05-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506.
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER - SENT TO PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF NNADI, ESTHER
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ALTON MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-12-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NNADI, ESTHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALTON MANAGEMENT CORPORATION $701.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $701.00, (1.) $201 SECURITY DEPOSIT AS NO ITEMIZED STATEMENT WAS GIVEN TO TENANT. (2.) $500 FOR HARASSMENT CLAIM. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF O. NNADI (MINOR) ZERO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-03-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
ORDER ON PETITION TO APPOINT GUARDIAN AD LITEM. PETITION GRANTED - JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING - ADVANCE HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF NNADI, ESTHER NNADI, ESTHER GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR ONYEMAECHI NNADI (MINOR)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2013 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-12-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT NOTIFIED THAT NOTICE FOR CONTINUANCE MAY NOT REACH THEM IN TIME BEFORE THE HEARING DATE; PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ASKED TO WRITE DOWN THE HEARING DATE AND TIME. PLAINTIFF DID NOT WANT PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THIS CASE TODAY. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, EXCEPT PLAINTIFF NNADI ONYEMAECHI (MINOR) WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY LATISHA WOODS--ADMINISTRATOR SITE. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-12-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-12-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL L. LAU. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY LATISHA WOODS--SITE ADMINISTRATOR. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL L. LAU. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
